fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Unitree G1. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Make the G1 do a deep squat and hold the position"
"Put the G1 in a natural standing at-ease pose"
"Make the G1 reach both arms forward like it's pushing something"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Make the G1 feel heavier and more grounded"
"Show what happens if the G1 stands on a sloped surface"
"Increase joint stiffness so the G1 holds poses more firmly"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a table to the scene for the G1 to interact with"
"Give the G1 a wave gesture triggered on demand"
"Add a second G1 to the scene standing opposite the first"
